channel.title: Ashraf El Desoky – Articles
channel.description: Articles and insights on project management, telecommunications, and digital transformation by Ashraf El Desoky, PMP®.

item.title: Earned Value Management: A Complete Guide
item.description: Master EVM fundamentals — PV, EV, AC, CPI, SPI — with real-world examples. Learn how to forecast project health and cost at completion.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky

item.title: FTTH Network Rollout: Lessons from 10 Years with STC
item.description: Key lessons from managing one of the largest FTTH rollout programmes in the Middle East — planning, execution, supply chain, and quality control.
item.author: Ashraf Ibrahim El Desoky
